description_long: This is a large, stylized hammer with a cylindrical wooden head, capped at both ends with metallic bands. The head features a prominent yellow star set against a red background on each striking face, giving it a distinctive and playful appearance. The handle is long, straight, and made of wood, smoothly finished and attached centrally to the head. The hammer stands upright on a thick, golden base that is circular and embossed with a cross-like pattern, suggesting it may be a display or ceremonial piece. The metallic bands on the head have a slightly riveted texture, adding to the visual interest. The overall design is bold and cartoonish, with clean lines and vibrant colors.
description: A large, cartoonish hammer with a wooden handle, a cylindrical head featuring yellow stars, and a thick golden display base.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the side, showing the wooden head with a yellow star and the full length of the handle attached to a golden base.
description_view_1: This view faces the striking end of the hammer, highlighting the yellow star on the red face and the circular golden base below.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the hammer head is visible, showing the star motif and the metallic banding, with the handle and base in profile.
description_view_3: A direct view of the other striking face, again showing the yellow star, with the handle and base clearly visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle, smooth finish, cylindrical shape, no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Large cylindrical wooden head with flat striking faces, capped with metallic bands, each face featuring a yellow star on a red background.
